arts.ttl: How Spurs' mistakes cost them against Chelsea
arts.sum: Match of the Day 2 pundits Ashley Williams and Troy Deeney discuss the individual Tottenham Hotspur mistakes that resulted in Chelsea coming from two goals down to win 4-3.

arts.ttl: Spurs must believe in what Postecoglou is doing - Sutton
arts.sum: Chris Sutton discusses Ange Postecoglou's problems at Spurs and whether the 4-3 loss to Chelsea shows their style of play in unsustainable.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou reveals Cristian Romero's next steps after public Daniel Levy blast
arts.sum: Tottenham defender Cristian Romero took aim at the club's chairman Daniel Levy following the weekend defeat to Chelsea, with Ange Postecoglou admitting he has now apologised

arts.ttl: Smirking Ange Postecoglou declares Rangers return is what he loves as he laps up 'bear pit'
arts.sum: The Australian is in dire need of a win as he takes Spurs to Ibrox in the Europa League

arts.ttl: Director admits 'exceptional' Liverpool and Tottenham target is likely to leave, he was nicknamed Messi
arts.sum: He's been likened to Lionel Messi...

arts.ttl: Cristian Romero sends live TV demand to Daniel Levy - but ex-Tottenham star disagrees - football.london
arts.sum: Cristian Romero has criticised Tottenham's board for a lack of investment following Sunday's poor 4-3 defeat at home to London rivals Chelsea . "If you look at what Daniel Levy has done and take it out of this era and put it, 20, 30, 40 years ago, he'd be the best chairman in the world - there would be a statue outside the stadium of him," Townsend said on BBC Radio 5 Live's Monday Night Club .

arts.ttl: Tottenham star Jessica Naz is more motivated than ever after making her first England start under Sarina Wiegman, writes TARA ANSON-WALSH - the winger now has her sights set on a spot at Euro 2025
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE INTERVIEW BY TARA ANSON-WALSH: England's rising football star Naz has had a whirlwind year, and now she's back home in north London with a deserved smile on her face.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher has been proven right about Tottenham and Daniel Levy after Cristian Romero rant
arts.sum: Six years ago, the ex-Liverpool defender slammed Daniel Levy for his lack of ambition - after the Lilywhites didn't strengthen their squad in the summer transfer window . Speaking to Spanish broadcaster Telemundo Deportes, following Tottenham's 4-3 defeat to London rivals Chelsea, he attributed the club's downfall to their lack of competitiveness in the transfer market.

arts.ttl: Philippe Clement confident Rangers can produce memorable night against Tottenham
arts.sum: Clement stressed the timeless potential for overcoming the odds, pointing to when he was part of Club Brugge’s victory over AC Milan in 2003.

arts.ttl: ‘Feel for him’: Ian Wright says he actually feels really sorry for one Tottenham man at the moment
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are going through a real rough patch at the moment. Indeed, Spurs are struggling. Tottenham sit 11th in the table, and they’ve failed...
